title: Reseeded | Seeds
description: Refreshed textures for every seed that more represent how they should look!
body:
# 🥜 Seeds included in resource pack
- Wheat
- Beetroot
- Pumpkin
- Melon
- Cocoa Beans


# ⚙️ Technical stuff or something
- Go to my [strawpage](https://sniezekmod.straw.page/) for any of:
  - issues ⚠️
  -  your ideas 🧠
  -   just casual questions to me ❔
  
- Pack should work on most of the versions
  
- Instructions how to use for dummies:
  1. Just Install it
  2. Put it in the texture pack folder
  3. Turn it on and you good to go!
  
- ###  **License ARR, you can't modify neither reuploud any of my assets and credit as your own**
